testCases.title: Verify that POST request to create policy endpoint returns 201 status code with valid payload

steps.expected: Configured credentials should be entered successfully

steps.action: Send POST request to policy creation endpoint with valid customer details, policy type, coverage amount, premium, and effective date
Verify response status code is 201 Created
Verify response body contains policy number and confirmation message
steps.expected: Policy creation confirmation should be returned in response
